title: carissa brownii var. ovata
intro: Carissa brownii var. ovata, also known as the Natal plum or Forest-fruit, is a thorny shrub native to South Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Carissa brownii var. ovata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
